suppress.notes: org.eclipse.angus:angus-activation 2.0.3 is the latest stable release in Maven Central. Dependency-Check maps it to the wider angus_mail CPE; review when a newer stable Angus Activation release is available.

Apache Tomcat 10.1.54 is the latest 10.1.x release available in Maven Central for Spring Boot 3.5.x. Review and remove this suppression when a fixed 10.1.x release is available or after a tested migration to the next supported Spring Boot/Tomcat line.

Apache Tomcat 10.1.54 is the latest 10.1.x release available in Maven Central for Spring Boot 3.5.x. This suppresses the matching embedded WebSocket artifact from the same Tomcat release and must be reviewed with the core Tomcat suppression.
